name: Tortuga 1667
description: Tortuga 1667 is Facade Games' Caribbean pirate social-deduction outing — sail under the Jolly Roger toward Spanish gold, vote on captain's orders, plunder enemy ships, and decide when to mutiny. Hidden allegiances, fluid alliances, and a chest of doubloons dictate who walks the plank and who walks away rich. Same Dark Cities-style prestige booklet, more rum.
